programme.title: Hoarders: Ingrid
programme.desc: Home shopping junky, Ingrid, has let her hoarding take over her home. Unopened boxes fill rooms to the point that it is impossible to use almost the entire house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ruby and Mary
programme.desc: Ruby's house is so hoarded she spends her entire day living in the car, and her grandson has started running the streets of LA.

programme.title: Hoarders: Joni and Millie
programme.desc: Child Protective Services had to take Joni's granddaughter away from her because of her hoarding. Also, Millie has already tried to clean up her act, only to relapse and start hoarding again. Daughter Chelsea has one last ultimatum for her.

programme.title: Hoarders: Hanna/ Kathy and Gary
programme.desc: Hanna has hoarded herself and her 200 chickens out of her house and lives with the chickens in a windowless, unheated trailer. Kathy and Gary have let 30 rabbits run loose inside their rented house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Vula/ Lisa
programme.desc: Vula hoards more than 30 sickly cats that have completely destroyed her home. Lisa, a teacher, has already lost one job by bringing her hoard from home to the classroom.

programme.title: Hoarders: Sandra
programme.desc: Sandra hoarded out every square inch of the historic mansion she lost to foreclosure, but she refuses to leave in spite of the fact the bank has sold it to a new couple.

programme.title: Movie: First Kill
programme.desc: After a father and son witness a cold-blooded murder in the woods, the son is kidnapped by a gang which forces the father to help them. He teams up with the local police chief to get his son back and take down the ruthless gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: Movie: The Expendables
programme.desc: A group of highly skilled mercenaries travel to South America to overthrow the dictator of a small island. After they arrive the team is challenged by local rebels.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: British Invasion
programme.desc: The guys cross the pond for the first-ever international episode of Impractical Jokers. Joe, Murr, Q and Sal may be up to their old tricks, but the clueless people on the receiving end of the those tricks won't be the typical 'marks' they're used to.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Show Party 3
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Show Party 3
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Show Party 3
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Movie: Friday After Next
programme.desc: Two cousins move in together and work as nighttime security guards. Their house is robbed on Christmas Eve and they team up to track the criminal down.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Losers Special
programme.desc: Dave Hill, Tone Bell, and Julian McCullough compete to finally earn a win or at least avoid the dreaded apology.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: That's My Wife
programme.desc: Amir K guesses the last book that Natasha Leggero read, Moshe Kasher does a mean striper impersonation, and Natasha reveals Moshe's favorite class in school.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Comedy Knocked Up
programme.desc: Moshe Kasher does the best victory dance ever, Clayton English and Moshe get real playing patty cake, and Natasha Leggero reveals two men in one from her past.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: America's Next Top Bottom
programme.desc: Noah Gardenswartz reveals why Santa never visits anyone on the panel, Liza Treyger counsels a guy with a stalking ex and Yassir Lester spots a hip-hop superstar in the crowd.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Little Press Bureaus
programme.desc: Find out what Josh Wolf's dad calls the Constitution, why Shane Torres clearly wants to be a news reporter, and what Gina Yashere would use to make Shane laugh.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: All Holiday Special

programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into everything from pretzels to paella. In Bozeman, Mont., a five-star take on breakfast with a Mexican pork masterpiece and a French toast Monte Cristo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Slammin' Sammies
programme.desc: Guy hits up hot eateries around the nation; visiting in Virginia Beach and San Antonio.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pub Grub and More
programme.desc: Guy is on the search for the real deal in bar foods and some Salvadorian classics.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grillin' and Smokin'
programme.desc: Guy experiences the unusual off the grill, such as a Thai twist on classic Texas bbq.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cultural Twist
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into cultural cuisine with a twist! First, there's a cafe that's been serving scratch-made Scandinavian specialties in Salt Lake City since the 1950s. Next, there's a pizza joint putting an Indian spin on the classic Italian pie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fully Loaded
programme.desc: Guy is on the search for the biggest and fullest loaded meals and flavours around.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Barbecue, Batter and Beer Can Chicken
programme.desc: Maui, Hawaii has ridiculous ramen and beer can chicken. Los Angeles has a food truck with a twist on fish and chips. Plus, a barbecue spot with fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Signature Twists
programme.desc: Guy visits unique comfort food places, such as the dog-friendly neighbourhood joint that serves the Barking Lard BLT.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Scratch Made Classics
programme.desc: This trip, some of Guy's favourites are totally homemade from coast to coast. In Manhattan, N.Y., a real deal chef is crankin' out homemade pretzels with a special beer cheese sauce.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Massachusetts Madness
programme.desc: Guy's grubbin' from one end of Massachusetts to the other, fillin' up the tank with stuffed specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Mouthfuls
programme.desc: Guy's unhinging his jaw for some mega mouthfuls! In Robbinsville, New Jersey, a real-deal Italian market cookin' up prosciutto bread and their multi-meat 'boss of the sauce'.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Talkin Turkey
programme.desc: Guy Fieri enjoys a turkey dinner at a Boston joint where it's Thanksgiving every day.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly, Beef and Bratwurst
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hittin' the road and diggin' into some serious meat. In Atlanta, a funky Asian spot putting out prime-time pork belly and wok-fried chicken. In Vancouver, an elevated diner dishing out duck pancakes and not-your-momma's meatloaf.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lots of Latin
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is loading up on all kinds of Latin on this trip. In Logan, Utah, a Salvadoran spot puttin' out pupusas and a cabeza creation. A funky food truck in Denver dishing out prime-time Puerto Rican specialties. And in Burlington, Vt.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Steak, Sausage and Salami
programme.desc: It's meat mayhem and Guy Fieri is checking out a joint known for cheesesteaks and meatballs that have taken over Salt Lake City. Then, a father-son team stays true to their Italian roots.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Taste Of Italy
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits up his favorite Italian joints from over the years. In Scottsdale, Arizona, a real-deal Italian grocer crankin' out scratch-made staples like gnocchi and prosciutto that bring a tear to Guy's eye.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Around The World
programme.desc: It's an international affair as Guy Fieri revisits old favourites. The Triple D Nation took notice in Miami when a Latin-inspired place opened a fast-casual joint to serve the masses, and their burger tower is the talk of the town.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Hidden Talent Party
programme.desc: Giada hosts a cocktail party and good old-fashioned talent show with her friends in the style of a creative salon. Guests bring their best creative hidden talents, whether it's singing, playing the guitar, magic or juggling.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Cocoa-Licious Brunch
programme.desc: Chocolate lovers will delight in Bobby Flay's ultimate cocoa-filled brunch! He's serving up decadent dishes like chocolate-drizzled scones, stuffed Mexican hot chocolate French toast with cinnamon whipped cream, and a chocolate peanut butter smoothies.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Incredible Vegetables
programme.desc: Ina's turning ordinary vegetables into extraordinary dishes.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Bang For Your Buck Barbecue
programme.desc: Valerie and Tom accidentally double-book friends over for dinner, Valerie saves the day by inviting both couples over for a casual backyard barbecue -- delicious, easy and one of the most cost-effective ways to entertain.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The Sleepover Six
programme.desc: Ree prepares food for a Drummond cousin sleepover at the lodge.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Big House Clear Up
programme.desc: It's a big day of cleaning up the homestead with a massive bonfire to round it all off after an alfresco dinner.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Pet Parade
programme.desc: Ree and her basset hound, Charlie, have been invited to a pet parade and potluck picnic. Ree makes roasted lemon chicken legs, Mexican macaroni salad, watermelon pico de Gallo and brown sugar oatmeal cookies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 4
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is tackling two days and three great breakfast dishes on the ranch with the help of her kids behind the cameras. First, she shares a fabulous Hash Brown Breakfast Pizza and divinely easy French Toast Roll-Ups.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: So Baller!
programme.desc: Molly shares some of her favourite round recipes so that everybody gets to be a little bit baller. She makes crispy Asian scotch eggs and two versions of meatball: ground turkey meatballs and meatless meatball sliders with a twist.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Sicilian Splash Party
programme.desc: Valerie went on the trip of a lifetime to Italy last summer, but this year, she's bringing Italy to her own backyard! She's hosting an elegant poolside party inspired by her adventures in Sicily to kick off the summer.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Southern Spread
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites his chef friends to bring the heartwarming hospitality of the South to the ranch. Marc Murphy puts his delicious spin on two Southern classics, shrimp and grits and charred corn salad with andouille sausage and red onion.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Comfort Classics and Fruity Cocktails
programme.desc: Proving you can make any dish outside on a grill, Michael prepares a rich mac and cheese loaded with smoked ham with cream cheese, gouda and pecorino. He finishes off with a grilled apple crisp over their fire pit.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Get Out and Cook
programme.desc: It's time for fresh air and fresh flavors with Jeff Mauro's grilled spinach and artichoke stuffed chicken and Sunny Anderson's Migas Verde. Geoffrey Zakarian shares a recipe for grilled asparagus that uses only five ingredients.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Best of the West
programme.desc: From a taste of the Rocky Mountains to southwestern specialties, he's takin' in the flavor of the region at all kinds of righteous joints.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real-Deal Diners
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's traveling the country hitting up real-deal diners. From coast to coast and everywhere in-between, these all-American staples are servin' up the bomb breakfasts and classic comfort food, with a few surprises mixed into the menu.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Mexican
programme.desc: Some of the best stops on Guy's road trip have been Mexican Places. With generations of family recipes and fresh ingredients, it's not wonder the food is incredible.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Catfish

programme.title: American Dad!: Camp Campawanda
programme.desc: Steve is upset when Snot threatens their summer camp fun by becoming a counselor-in-training. Hayley and Jeff are suspicious of Roger when he organizes a Burning Man re-enactment in the yard for their anniversary.

programme.desc: In true Belcher fashion, the family gets stuck in a terrible storm while vacationing at a beach house in Craggy Neck. The storm is the least of their worries, however, when they are forced to take shelter with the mysterious owner of the home.

programme.title: Rick and Morty: Edge of Tomorty: Rick Die Rickpeat

programme.title: Family Guy: Quagmire's Quagmire
programme.desc: When Quagmire meets a woman named Sonja who is as sexually insatiable as he is, he is thrilled to finally be with someone who won't judge him. However, things take a turn for the worse when Sonja abducts Quagmire, intending to make him her sex slave.

programme.title: The Venture Bros.: Arrears in Science
programme.desc: Escapades of pseudo-heroic scientist Dr. Rusty Venture, his bodyguard and his two sons.

programme.title: Aqua TV Show Show: Merlo Sauvignon Blanco

programme.title: Aqua TV Show Show: Working Stiffs

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Housetrap
programme.desc: In true Belcher fashion, the family gets stuck in a terrible storm while vacationing at a beach house in Craggy Neck. The storm is the least of their worries, however, when they are forced to take shelter with the mysterious owner of the home.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Cat's Fancy
programme.desc: Robin decides to become a cat so that Starfire will finally love him.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Grube's Fairytales
programme.desc: Robin tries to teach the Titans valuable life lessons by reading them fairy tales, but the others co-opt his stories and spin them into their own twisted yarns.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet: The Mysterious Revenger/ Wynton Vs. Lia
programme.desc: It’s the quarter finals of the Bakugan Battle League, the top eight brawlers are set to face off! In this round, Dan will face off against the Bakugan rocker - Revenger!

programme.title: Ben 10: You Remind Me of Someone
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen look for the infamous Bojamboo (the Bigfoot of the South) and discover that it’s actually the Forgeti.

programme.title: Ben 10: Adrenaland Jr.
programme.desc: Team Tennyson visits the safety-neutered version of Adrenaland known as 'Adrenaland Jr.,' only to end up facing off against a bitter Kevin 11, out to destroy everyone else’s good, and safe, time.

programme.title: Power Players: Bring on the Bad Guys

programme.title: Power Players: Spies Like Us
programme.desc: Axel seems normal, but he can transform! Join him in recruiting a team of toy heroes!

programme.title: Power Players: Return of Thermometron 9000
programme.desc: Axel seems normal, but he can transform! Join him in recruiting a team of toy heroes!

programme.title: Power Players: Just Like Robots
programme.desc: Axel seems normal, but he can transform! Join him in recruiting a team of toy heroes!

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Fuss
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are planning on seeing the scariest movie of the year, but everyone else has already seen it, and won't stop talking about it. Gumball is determined to avoid spoilers.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Stars
programme.desc: Dad gets a free haircut after giving Larry’s hairdresser a bad review, which inspires Gumball and Darwin to go on a reviewing spree in order to receive more free stuff.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The News
programme.desc: All the breaking stories from the Elmore newsroom.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Box
programme.desc: The Wattersons receive an unmarked package in the mail. To distract themselves from the urge to open it they all take turns to imagine what it might contain.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Vase
programme.desc: Sick of Granny Jojo's ugly gifts, Nicole encourages the kids to take matters into their own hands and accidentally break her latest hideous vase. When Gumball, Darwin and Anais try to destroy it, they discover it is more robust than it seems.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Gumball catches Darwin gazing wistfully at a photo of Teri on Elmore Plus and secretly enlists Carrie to help bring them together.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Ollie
programme.desc: When Darwin asks Gumball to teach him how to skate, Gumball makes sure he covers every aspect of the skating lifestyle from wearing the right gear, using the right terms and choosing the right board.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Grades
programme.desc: Miss Simian is amused when a failed test from Gumball's past brings down his grade point average, which means that he'll have to repeat kindergarten.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Potato
programme.desc: After lunch with Idaho, Darwin decides to stop eating potatoes. When he finds it harder to kick his favourite carb habit than he thought, Gumball decides to try to help.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Diet
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin discover the reason Dad’s diet wasn’t working was that he was actually on ten diets and eating a meal for each of them.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Sorcerer
programme.desc: Gumball can't accept that he's the only student without special powers. He becomes Hector’s mom's apprentice and she quickly learns that it's not wise to leave Gumball unsupervised around magic.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Ex
programme.desc: Rob, Gumball's former nemesis, begins to 'neme-see' someone new. Unconvinced that Rob has moved on, Gumball does what he can to sabatoge Rob's new relationship with foe Banana Joe.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Console
programme.desc: Elmore becomes trapped inside a fantasy RPG world when Gumball is given a cursed videogame console. Gumball, Darwin and Anais have to battle their way through town, unraveling the secrets of their new virtual reality and leveling up to defeat the Boss.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Menu
programme.desc: The prize jewel on the Secret Joyful Burger menu is a mysterious burger, but to order it you need to know its name. When Larry refuses to tell them what it’s called, they go to super-sized lengths to discover it.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Leg Day
programme.desc: After being defeated due to poor leg strength, Raven and the Titans work out their lower bodies and become the League of Legs.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: A Farce

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Dignity of Teeth
programme.desc: When Beast Boy gets a stack of cash from the Tooth Fairy, against Raven's advice the other Titans start knocking out their own teeth to get some of that sweet Tooth Fairy money.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Animals: It's Just a Word
programme.desc: After the other Titans are injured, Beast Boy donates his blood to save them.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Croissant
programme.desc: A giant cocoon mysteriously appears in the Titans' living room, and no one can find Beast Boy.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Squash and Stretch
programme.desc: The Titans learn about cartoon-style violence in order to get revenge on a snack-stealing squirrel.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Spice Game
programme.desc: Tired of Robin's bland cooking, the other Titans try their hand at spicing up their food.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: BBBDay!
programme.desc: It's Beast Boy's birthday!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: I'm the Sauce
programme.desc: Stuck inside because of bad weather, the Titans play rainy day games after Robin convinces them that indoor activities will cheer up the clouds and make the rain stop.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Pyramid Scheme
programme.desc: Beast Boy starts making tons of cash thanks to a pyramid scheme and convinces the other Titans to join in.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Accept the Next Proposition You Hear
programme.desc: Robin refuses to give the Titans any more orders so that they'll learn to think for themselves. Instead, the Titans start taking their cues from fortune cookies.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Finally a Lesson
programme.desc: Robin finally teaches the other Titans a very valuable lesson.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Hey You, Don't Forget About Me in Your Memory
programme.desc: Robin convinces the Titans to go back to school with him so he can finally become the all-American class president-type he's always dreamed of being.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Arms Race With Legs
programme.desc: When her teammates turn evil, it's up to Lady Legasus to stop the League of Legs.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: The Fourth Wall
programme.desc: Control Freak informs the Titans that they are on a TV show he created and demands they earn him an award.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: Obinray

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: #CrashCourse
programme.desc: Diana, Kara, and Barbara do more than save citizens from Super-Villains.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Ain't No Party Like a Hamptons Party
programme.desc: Hamptons weekend wraps with a tennis grudge match between Luann and Ramona, a girls night at Ramona's house turns into a wild ruckus as Leah, Tinsley and Sonja go skinny dipping. Tiki torches are thrown, and a vibrator finds a home in the chicken piccata.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Not So Model Behavior

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Just the Sip

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: How You Like Them Apples?
programme.desc: Tinsley vents to Leah’s boxing coach about her issues with Dorinda, while across town Dorinda confirms to Sonja that she and John are officially on a break. Luann opens up to Leah about her relationship with drinking. The ladies take a day trip.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: If You Can't Take the Heat, Get Out of the Russian Bath House
programme.desc: Stressed out by the tension between the group, Leah arranges a spa day at a Russian bath house. Dorinda and Tinsley call a truce, while Ramona confronts Dorinda about her anger issues. Later, Ramona and Dorinda's disagreement reaches a boiling point.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Hurricane Leah

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Something's Brewing

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Ring
programme.desc: In 1987, Pat Postiglione is tasked with solving his first homicide: a young mother strangled to death inside her apartment. Without any viable suspects, Pat faces the daunting task of interviewing his only witness: the victim's 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Stopwatch
programme.desc: In 1993, a night clerk is shot dead inside the lobby of a hotel. Despite eyewitness accounts, Detective Postiglione can't locate the killer. Recalling subtle clues left outside the crime scene, he finally comes face to face with a most unusual suspect.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Check List
programme.desc: In 1991, a woman is found murdered inside a Nashville motel room. The investigation escalates after Detective Postiglione discovers a similar crime scene in Cincinnati, sending him on a year-long odyssey to capture a serial killer.

programme.title: Southwest of Salem: The Story of the San Antonio Four
programme.desc: After being wrongfully convicted of gang-raping two little girls during the 'Satanic Panic' of the '80s and '90s, four Latina lesbians fight against mythology, homophobia and prosecutorial fervor in their struggle for freedom.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Hero Betrayed
programme.desc: When a hero firefighter is found savagely murdered in his own home, the trail of evidence police find takes them on a twisting and tension filled journey to justice.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: One of Their Own
programme.desc: When the daughter of an FBI agent disappears from an airport parking lot, law enforcement from all over the country rallies to find one of their own. But the case quickly becomes one of the bureau's most difficult and heartbreaking investigations.

programme.title: Southwest of Salem: The Story of the San Antonio Four
programme.desc: After being wrongfully convicted of gang-raping two little girls during the 'Satanic Panic' of the '80s and '90s, four Latina lesbians fight against mythology, homophobia and prosecutorial fervor in their struggle for freedom.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: River of Tears
programme.desc: A young woman's lifeless body is found on the bank of a shallow river. Would a note found in her pocket be the key to finding her killer?

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Unchecked Violence
programme.desc: When a senior at Ohio State University goes missing, it marks the beginning of a terrifying murder mystery.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Message in Red
programme.desc: When a beloved couple is gunned down in the presence of children, a cryptic message scrawled across the home leads police to suspect the crime may be drug related. The only problem is, there's no evidence the victims had any involvement in the drug trade.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who Killed Miss Brown Sugar
programme.desc: When 21-year-old Erica Vassell disappears after a Super Bowl party in Clewiston, Florida, the town launches an immediate search. But when her brutally murdered body is discovered days later, everyone in the tiny glades town is left in shock and fear.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In the Shadows of Home
programme.desc: The body of a teenager is found savagely murdered just steps from her home. When the investigation stalls police are approached by a brave young woman willing to risk her own safety to get justice.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Long Sought Truth
programme.desc: Decades of investigation reveal the long-sought truth behind the terrifying abduction and murder of a young mother of three.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Notes from a Killer
programme.desc: When a young girl disappears off a quiet suburban street, it marks the beginning of a terrifying game of cat and mouse between police and her abductor.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Prints of Darkness
programme.desc: When Michael and Melisa Augustson move to little Alma, Georgia they're soon taken in by the community. But on December 14th, Michael comes home to a scene of unspeakable horror. His wife has been murdered, and only one person in the town knows why.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Hellfire in the Hollow
programme.desc: When a 21-year-old mother doesn't return from night classes and her car is found burned, investigators immediately suspect foul play. However no one is prepare for the web of lies that ultimately unfold due to her disappearance.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: All-American Sweethearts
programme.desc: Eighteen-year-old Kelly Eckart disappears one night after finishing up her shift at a local hardware store. Hours later her car is discovered abandoned by the side of the road, still running, but Kelly is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who Killed the Music?
programme.desc: When John Tarwacki Sr. discovers the bodies of his son and daughter-in-law, the only story told at the scene is found in the snow. Boot prints reveal the path the killer took, but the search for motive will lead police in a startling direction.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Cost of Competition
programme.desc: When the home of the Resaca, Georgia 'Carpet King' is showered with gunfire and kills beloved daughter Tara Swilley, the self-made millionaire is convinced one of his business partners must be behind the killing.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Grim Reaper
programme.desc: When Linda found out her biological father was her family friend, Greg Scarpa, she was overjoyed. But when the rest of Greg's bloody secrets came out, Linda learned that being part of his family wasn't just dangerous, it was potentially deadly.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Twisted Sister
programme.desc: When Elizabeth Flores was a child, her sister, Louise, tried to shield her from a horrible family secret. But when Louise met David Turpin, that all changed. The girl who ran from monsters became one herself.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: You Know My Brother's Name
programme.desc: When Karen Kuzma was a little girl, she adored her older brother. As they grew older, she saw changes in him that she didn't understand, but it never occurred to her that he was becoming the most infamous serial killer in American history.

programme.title: Alcatraz: Beyond the Rock
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: The Renegade Mobster
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Lucky Luciano: Father of the Mob
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the U.S. government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco: The Informant
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions, and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: The Mob Enforcer: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: See the story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: The Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. But by the early 2000's evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles

programme.desc: A Nashville family is ready for Kyle and Justin to build the perfect pool in their backyard. The project gets off to a rocky start, but the Poll Kings deliver a phenomenal backyard complete with a massive waterfall and beautiful pavilion.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Rockin' Resort Pool
programme.desc: The Pool Kings go above and beyond to create a project that has space for everyone in a big family. It includes a 15-foot tall natural rock grotto, swim-up bar, sun shelf and outdoor living room.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Heaven
programme.desc: After years of clearing and construction, Rene and Kelly are finally ready to put in a pool that completes their beautiful, 20-acre San Antonio property. Tony and Paul include a huge natural waterfall, stacked-stone spa and Baja shelf.

programme.title: I Want That!: Builders, Kitchen and Bath Show
programme.desc: Be the first in the know about the latest high-tech gadgets and design trends.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Texas Transformation in Port Aransas

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Renovation in South Florida
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach home to renovate on a budget in South Florida.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Poolside Paradise in Cocoa Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Candice and Brian are moving from Denver, Colo. to Cocoa Beach, Fla., and have enlisted broker Andy Barclay to help them find a home on the water with a pool and a large outdoor space for their two daughters.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Margate, New Jersey
programme.desc: Sharon hunts for a beachfront home where she and her kids can rediscover the magic of the Jersey Shore. With a tight budget and a big wish list, they hope to pull off all the renovations and create the family retreat of their dreams.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Texas-Sized Renovation On South Padre Island
programme.desc: A couple and their four kids are looking for a vacation retreat on South Padre Island in Texas. After recently renovating a rental property in the area, they've decided they are ready to get their hands dirty again.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Supersizing in St. Petersburg, Florida
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple loves their Florida lifestyle and desires to be on the water in St. Petersburg, which means they must take on a renovation project.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Revamp on the Outer Banks
Good Eats: Reloaded: Flat Is Beautiful II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown gives the 'reload' treatment to a show about flattened meat dishes, including a new chicken piccata and a chicken Kiev that's actually a schnitzel.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Cake on Every Plate: The Reload

programme.title: Unique Eats: Nostalgic Noshes
programme.desc: Join us for a trip down memory lane as we discover restaurants serving dishes that are reminiscent of the old days but with a deliciously modern twist. A renowned chef updates the Asian dishes from his childhood.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Romantic Spots
programme.desc: We tour the Big Apple, dipping into eateries that are perfect for you and that someone.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Global
programme.desc: We travel across the country to taste our way across the globe.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Colorado Sweets
programme.desc: Colorado has some amazing sweets. Head to High Point Creamery in Denver from some unusual ice cream flavors like lemon ice pop with raspberry swirl and earl grey tea with shortbread.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Savory Sweets
programme.desc: Sweet and savory flavors are such an irresistible combination. We visit three sweet and savory hot spots including Aiko Pops in Denver, where ice pops come in radical flavors like raspberry and sweet corn.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Ice Cream Nation
programme.desc: At Morgentern's Finest Ice Cream in New York, inventive flavors and unusual toppings take center stage.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Party Animals
programme.desc: Even hippos love cake, and Cake Wars is celebrating the first birthday of Rosie the baby hippo from the Los Angeles Zoo! Four bakers go to battle for the chance to have their amazing cake creation at the center of this wild birthday party.

programme.title: Cake Wars: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Four talented cake makers compete to have their creation at the centre of an epic party celebrating the latest season of Sesame Street.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: San Diego
programme.desc: From wild vegetables to wild animals, Andrew gets a taste of the unexpected when he visits San Diego.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Miami
programme.desc: Blend of old-world immigrants and new-wave trendsetters bring a mix of flavour to Miami.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Big Island
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Hawaii's Big Island to take in its laid-back cuisine. From ancient traditions like lau lau and opakapaka fish to new traditions like the loco moco and huli chicken, he dives deep into the island's food culture.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Montevideo
programme.desc: Andrew digs into the culinary treasures of Uruguay's capital city, Montevideo. He explores this meaty mecca by highlighting their slow-cooked Asado meats, a thin-sliced steak sandwich called chivito, and breaded and fried beef.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Scottish Highlands
programme.desc: Andrew explores the bountiful larder and proud history that provides chefs in the Scottish Highlands with the building blocks for uniquely Highland dishes. He enjoys lean, flavourful Highland beef, buttery shellfish, and handheld meat pies.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tokyo
programme.desc: Tokyo, Japan, is a world leader in everything from finance to technology -- and food! In a spectacular city known for such edible icons as sushi and tempura, Andrew Zimmern explores just what makes this destination so delicious.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.desc: Jeanette signs the Chipmunks and Chipettes up for a green living competition. Alvin likes a girl at school so he agrees to look after her talking bird, but he's nervous about the bird blabbing when he says something damaging.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: I Will Survive/ Alvin's Got a Brand New Bag
programme.desc: When Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner. Alvin accidentally ruins Brittany's favorite new bag and must come up with a way to replace it.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Let's Make a Steal
programme.desc: Captain Man gets Henry a spot on his favourite game show, Spin and Win, in an attempt to investigate a string of robberies - but Henry soon finds himself a victim of one such robbery.

programme.title: Henry Danger: My Phony Valentine
programme.desc: When Henry's crush goes on a Valentine's date with someone else, Schoz provides an android to make her jealous. Ray has an unpleasant date with one of Henry's teachers.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry Hart lands a part-time job as Kid Danger, a superhero sidekick in training.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Caved In
programme.desc: Henry, Charlotte and Ray's plans for a day of fun are derailed when Jasper accidentally triggers the emergency lockdown mode for Junk-N-Stuff and the Man Cave, trapping everyone inside.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Thundermans: Banished!
programme.desc: After the Thundermans' superhero secret is exposed and life at home becomes unmanageable, the family is relocated to a new city.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Max to the Future
programme.desc: Concerned that he isn't considered a valuable superhero, Max creates a machine that can predict future crimes, but when it doesn't work, he spins a web of lies to keep the truth from Phoebe.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Better Off Wed
programme.desc: The kids learn that Dr. Colosso ruined their parents' wedding years earlier, and want to recreate Hank and Barb's dream day as their anniversary gift.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Speechless
programme.desc: The kids help Myles plan Yasmine's big dinner at the house for her boss. While Myles struggles to write a speech in honor of his wife, the kids throw out the catered food and plan their own menu.

programme.title: Group Chat With Annie and Jayden
programme.desc: Annie LeBlanc and Jayden Bartels chat, play games and do crazy challenges with guests.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Blood Moon
programme.desc: Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Gift Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: In three separate mysterious tales, Stan is cursed by a witch, Waddles accidentally eats a bowl of brain-enhancing jelly and builds a machine that allows him to speak for the first time and Mabel faces her fear of Claymotion.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Movie: Bunks
programme.desc: Troublemaking brothers accidentally unleash a curse on their camp that brings every campfire story to life.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Potatoland
programme.desc: Mickey and Donald attempt to make Goofy’s dream come true by building a theme park made of potatoes.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Small Hiro One
programme.desc: Hiro becomes frustrated when he’s deemed too young to attend a science workshop hosted by SFIT’s most famous alumni, Dr. Trevor Trengrove.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Internabout
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: El Fuego
programme.desc: Professional mech-wrestler El Fuego is intent on becoming the toughest fighter in San Fransokyo and decides he must beat the strongest challenger he can find, Baymax.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: All Stars: The Chase With Han/ Escape With Chewbacca
programme.desc: Han Solo and a young mechanic named Pace get wrapped up in an ill-advised scheme to steal from the Empire. A young street swindler named Lena joins forces with Chewbacca.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: All Stars: Dealing with Lando / Han and Chewie Strike Back
programme.desc: Pace and Lena meet the smoothest mover and shaker in the galaxy, Lando Calrissian.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: All Stars: Scouting for Leia / A Mission With Maz
programme.desc: General Leia gives Moxie Freemaker the task of scouting old Rebel bases to see if they can be used for the Resistance.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: All Stars: Rolling with BB-8 / Resistance on the Run
programme.desc: With the help of BB-8, Moxie and Ka-Pao rescue RO-GR. As the battle for the fate of the galaxy heats up, Moxie and team make their contribution to the survival of the Resistance.

programme.title: Lego Star Wars: All Stars: From Trenches to Wrenches: The Roger Story
DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Rumble for Ragnarok!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: Double-O-Duck in You Only Crash Twice!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Inspiration! Challenging Valt!

programme.title: Yo-Kai Watch: Yo-kai Medallium/ Yo-kai Hungramps/ Yo-kai Wazzat/ Manjimutt: Part 3
programme.desc: Nate meets Hungramps, a Yo-kai triggering hunger pangs outside of a convenience store, and contends with an epidemic of forgetfulness caused by Yo-kai Wazzat. Meanwhile, Manjimutt searches for a new career.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Imitation Is the Sincerest Form of Strategy!

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something's Fishy

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper

programme.title: Movie: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The Crawley family and their household continue the story begun in the series of the same name. It is now 1927, and the King and Queen of England are planning a visit to the Crawleys' country estate.

programme.title: Movie: Casino Royale
programme.desc: On his first mission with 00 status, MI6 operative James Bond must stop Le Chiffre, a banker to the world's terrorist organizations, from winning a high-stakes poker tournament at Casino Royale.

programme.title: Movie: The Good Liar
programme.desc: A conman targets a wealthy widow, but his scam turns into a game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: I Know This Much Is True
programme.desc: A family saga following twins from the 1990's onwards.

programme.title: I May Destroy You
programme.desc: A Londoner must question and rebuild her life after a traumatic incident.

programme.title: Movie: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: Singer and songwriter Freddie Mercury helps form the band Queen, but at the same time that his flamboyant stage presence and powerful vocals lead the group to new levels of stardom his tumultuous personal life begins to spiral out of control.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: The outspoken comedian discusses hot topics.

programme.title: Movie: The Judge
programme.desc: A slick, big city lawyer returns to his hometown for his mother's funeral, where he's reunited with his estranged father, the town's judge. When he learns that his father is suspected of murder, he sets out to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Suited
programme.desc: A Brooklyn clothier specializes in bespoke suits for gender non-confirming clients. The feature explores how notions of fashion, appearance and identity can be profoundly interdependent.

programme.title: Movie: The Ringer
programme.desc: In order to slide out from beneath a mound of debt, a nice young man decides to rig the Special Olympics by posing as a contestant.

programme.title: Movie: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: Bond and M discover a secret international power network after an assassination attempt on M. Bond, still sore about his lover's murder, goes rogue in search of a global conspiracy and the search for power over smaller countries.

programme.title: Movie: The Island
programme.desc: Lincoln Six Echo and Jordan Two Delta are waiting to win the lottery so they can move to an island paradise. Shortly after Jordan wins the lottery, Lincoln discovers that they are actually clones and part of a sinister plot that must be stopped.

programme.title: HBO First Look: The King of Staten Island
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at film productions.

programme.title: Movie: X-Men
programme.desc: A professor, who is the head of a secret organization for mutants, leads a group of heroes against his arch nemesis Magneto in order to save the world.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Education
programme.desc: An embezzlement scandal surfaces within a successful Long Island public school district that threatens to destroy what has been built, and one of the men in charge is forced to maintain order and secrecy by whatever means necessary.

programme.title: Movie: Shaft
programme.desc: A cybersecurity expert investigates his friend's suspicious death.

programme.title: The Plot Against America
programme.desc: The familial ties in the Levin family reach a breaking point as violence, conspiracies and chaos run rampant in the lead up to Election Day.

programme.title: Movie: Spanglish
programme.desc: A Hispanic single mother, who recently immigrated to California, must deal with both language and cultural barriers and her daughter's Americanization when she is employed as a housekeeper in a dysfunctional household.

programme.title: Insecure

programme.desc: A confessed murderer gets details of the crime wrong during his allocution, causing Brenda to re-open the case. Her first thought is that he is trying to cover for his schizophrenic son, whose doctor was the victim.

programme.title: The Closer: Smells Like Murder
programme.desc: A large cooler with a body stuffed inside leads Brenda in search of suspects. Gabriel is studying for the detective exam, so Brenda uses the case as a teaching tool.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the mysterious disappearance and possible murder of a 20-year-old single mother, and must retrace her final steps to solve the mystery.

programme.title: The First 48: Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: In Cleveland, detectives investigate the murder of a 23-year-old mother found burned in the backyard of an abandoned house.

programme.title: The First 48: Innocent Bystander/ Partners in Crime
programme.desc: A man is stabbed at a strip mall in the middle of the night and surveillance video captures the murder, but it leaves more questions than answers.

programme.title: The First 48: Run and Gun/ Lonesome Highway
programme.desc: In New Orleans, Det. Maggie Darling is on the hunt for the killers who gunned down a recent high school graduate. Then, in Dallas, Det. Steve David races to identify a woman found shot and dumped on the highway.

programme.title: The First 48: Fatal Call
programme.desc: When a Dallas man is found shot to death in an apartment complex, the homicide team must rely on the eyes of the community to help solve the case.

programme.title: The First 48: Hit List/ Hand in Hand
programme.desc: In Miami, detectives investigate the murder of a 20-year-old male gunned down in the street in broad daylight. In DeKalb County, a 20-year-old man is shot dead while walking his girlfriend home at night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: An exotic dancer who listens to voices in her head is a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.desc: These true-life mysteries will explore the criminal’s motive, the perceived betrayal and the obsession that led to the deadly act.

programme.desc: These true-life mysteries focus on stories of revenge and betrayal carried out by the people seemingly most-trusted by their victims. Explore how the victims and perpetrator met, the criminal's motive, the deepening relationship and the deadly act.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Amazoned Out
programme.desc: Superfans Molly and Nate are dropped deep in the Amazon rainforest, a place that's taken down the best of the best. Nate and Molly lean on lessons learned from their couches to push through torrential rain, relentless bugs, and extreme sleep deprivation.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Croc Shock
programme.desc: As temperatures soar, survivalists try to hunt while being hunted themselves. At Camp Murder Puddle, the group fights off a night attack by aggressive crocodiles. A team in turmoil leads to the first self-banishment of the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Uncensored All-Stars: The Barehanded Killer
programme.desc: Kate is slammed by Africa's wrath after self-banishing. Bulent scores with his bare hands, and Makani may have to put aside her vegan beliefs to survive. Wes and Gwen's first big food win turns into a fail.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Uncensored All-Stars: No Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: A brutal windstorm punishes the survivalists. A falling out with Bulent leads Makani to banish herself and risk going it alone. Kate finds a new group and the desperate team goes on a hunt that could make or break their challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: What the Duck?
programme.desc: In Mexico's unforgiving, cenote-covered landscape, two fan survivalists are dropped on an island filled with venomous coral snakes, territorial jaguars, blood-sucking chiquistas and a duck named Henry that they desperately want to eat for dinner.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Foreign Exchange: Dropped in Croatia
Naked and Afraid: Little Person, Big Challenge
programme.desc: Underestimated his whole life, a survivalist with dwarfism tries to prove himself in the Amazon but struggles against predators and his partner.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Uncensored All-Stars: No Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: A brutal windstorm punishes the survivalists. A falling out with Bulent leads Makani to banish herself and risk going it alone. Kate finds a new group and the desperate team goes on a hunt that could make or break their challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Foreign Exchange: Dropped in Croatia
Naked and Afraid: Honduran Hell
programme.desc: In the mountainous rainforest of Honduras, a survivalist with an unusual past is paired with a hard-headed police detective, but predatorial jaguars, swarms of fire ants and a debilitating injury threaten their challenge.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Family Affair
programme.desc: Two weeks into the King Crab season, the fleet is already behind after a government shutdown and now a massive arctic storm. A harrowing Coast Guard airlift must abort with 100-knot winds whipping over the grounds.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Coast Guard Heroes
programme.desc: A USCG swimmer, pilot and captain, along with Sig, Keith, Bill, Casey, Jake and Sean give an insider's look at the scariest Bering Sea rescues. Many lives are saved and sadly, a few aren't.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Battle Scars
programme.desc: Scars still fresh from a harrowing season on the Bering Sea, and battered by a never-before-seen supermoon storm, the captains reveal the most critical decisions they've made and how those choices and actions have made them the captains they are today.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Troll's Choice Rolls-Royce
programme.desc: When Richard 'accidentally' buys $92K worth of cars at an auction, his bookkeeper sister insists he flip all five cars in one week. Some go more easily and profitably than others but it's a weirdly built Rolls Royce that even Aaron has a hard time fixing.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: '71 Cool Kingwood/ Retro Replicar
programme.desc: Aaron and crew turn an ugly duckling '71 Chevy Kingwood station wagon into the cool '70s hot rod dragster it was meant to be. Richard pries a 1980 MG Replicar from a husband reluctant to part with it. The Grill books its first musical act.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Fast Moving F100
programme.desc: Aaron's not impressed by the '72 Ford Pantera Richard picks up, but he and the Monkeys have fun bringing a Ford F100 truck back to life. Then, they head to Tennessee to try to buy back two pieces of Gas Monkey history: a ratrod and a panhead motorcycle.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Super Sonic Camero, Part II
programme.desc: The Monkey's go super big with their first corporate client Sonic Drive-In to build a promotional 68 Camaro SS convertible. But with only days left until delivery, Richard might miss out on a huge pay day, and tarnish his reputation.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Dale Jr.'s Sick Nomad
programme.desc: The Gas Monkey crew build NASCAR royalty Dale Earnhardt Jr. a 1956 Chevy Nomad. While Richard and Aaron travel to Dale Jr's Carolina home with the Nomad, the crew finds ways to cool off in the Texas heat.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Aaron's Falcon Racecar
programme.desc: Aaron falls in love with and buys a famous '63 Ford Falcon race car off Richard, but will the original owner be impressed by Aaron's Gas Money style? Meanwhile, Richard flips a 1919 Nash and an unusually painted truck.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Holy Grail Firebirds, Part II
programme.desc: With a 10K-a-day penalty looming, Richard can't afford to lose any more time on the two Firebirds' concourse restoration, but by the end of the project, the garage will be short two Monkeys. Richard flips a '49 Mercury that comes complete with passenger.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Jacked-Up Jeep
programme.desc: Aaron and the Gas Monkey crew overhaul a Jeep in 24 hours to surprise a friend. Richard flips a funky gull-winged Bricklin. Daphne convinces a reluctant Richard to hire his nephew. Dennis and Richard argue over how best to sell their COPO Camaros.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: '48 Chevy Fleetmaster
programme.desc: Richard gets ripped off on a '74 Corvette. A Chevy and 'Scarface' worthy '63 Caddy are auctioned off.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chopped and Dropped Model A, Part II
programme.desc: When Richard snaps back to his senses, he puts the monkeys back on track and they must finish the '31 Chopped Model A in ten days. It doesn't go without a lot of strife. Meanwhile, Richard and Dennis argue over a Holy Grail find of a '64 ½ Mustang.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Second City Hustlers
programme.desc: As their battle with Chicago approaches, the MSO scrambles to fix Heifer after losing her to a fender bender. JJ finds a '65 Malibu they can use, but Chicago is stacked with fast cars and street sense, so running an unknown may be out of the question.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Paul and Karine: Our Continuing Journey
programme.desc: A look back at the highs and lows of Paul and Karine's journey.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: Countdown to the New Season
programme.desc: Relive what Ashley and Jay, Chantel and Pedro, Elizabeth and Andrei, Russ and Pao, Nicole and Azan and Colt and Larissa went through for love. Plus, get a sneak peek at the upcoming season.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: What Goes Around, Comes Around
programme.desc: Colt visits a new love in secret. Angela is urged to seek legal advice about her relationship with Michael. Larissa's future in the US is in jeopardy. Andrei makes a sudden announcement to Elizabeth's family. Kalani asks Asuelu to change his priorities.

programme.title: sMothered: My Gift to You
programme.desc: Cher and Dawn are officially triplets, now that Baby Belle is in the world. Mary's shocking graduation gift to Brittani turns heads at her graduation party. Laurie pressures Miguel to hurry up and propose to Sarah. Marcie inspires Alena to drive.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: Pillow Talk: What Goes Around, Comes Around
programme.desc: Colt visits a new love in secret. Angela is urged to seek legal advice about her relationship with Michael. Larissa's future in the US is in jeopardy. Andrei makes a sudden announcement to Elizabeth's family. Kalani asks Asuelu to change his priorities.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: Pillow Talk: What Goes Around, Comes Around
programme.desc: Colt visits a new love in secret. Angela is urged to seek legal advice about her relationship with Michael. Larissa's future in the US is in jeopardy. Andrei makes a sudden announcement to Elizabeth's family. Kalani asks Asuelu to change his priorities.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Line in the Sand
programme.desc: Tensions rise as Larry's cousin confronts Jenny. Patrick makes a last ditch effort to win over Myriam. Sean returns to Ohio uncertain about his future with Abby.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: All or Nothing
programme.desc: Karine has a big decision ahead of her. Larry has an important question for Jenny. Cortney worries about the future as she leaves Spain. Darcey and Jesse share an emotional goodbye, and Sean returns to Haiti to see if Abby has kept her promise.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Holding on and Letting Go
programme.desc: Courtney struggles to pay attention to the big boys when they celebrate their combo birthday party and must deal with her separation anxiety when it comes to the babies. Eric's plan to save the farm puts him at odds with Courtney.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: New Couples, New Journeys
programme.desc: Using a unique 90 Day Fiancé visa, six foreigners will travel to the US to live with their overseas fiancés for the first time. Each couple will have just 90 days to decide to get married or send their international mate home.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: I'm Home America!
programme.desc: Evelin pushes Justin to introduce her to his family. At Yamir's album release party his manager throws his private life into the public eye. Mohamed meets Danielle's skeptical son. Daya questions her engagement ring. Plus, meet a new couple Danny and Amy.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Watch You Like a Hawk
programme.desc: Danny misses Amy's first day in America and Justin shocks relatives with news of his engagement. Also, Mohamed meets the rest of Danielle's family and Daya meets Brett's daughter for the first time. Plus, meet new couple Jason and Cassia.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Touchdown!
programme.desc: Amy confronts Danny about his overbearing family. Mohamed learns the meaning of 'hooking up.' Jason travels to Brazil, still uncertain if Cassia will meet him. Yamir arrives in the U.S. and Chelsea's parents have many questions about the couple's future.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Mo' Money, Mo Problems
programme.desc: Danielle fears Mohamed may leave, as her family grows skeptical. Justin sees his family for the first time since revealing his secret. Cassia fights with Jason about trust. Danny's brother ruins date night with Amy. Yamir's move yields devastating news.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Fears, Family, Future
programme.desc: Justin and Evelin invite Jake and Jen over for dinner. Daya confronts Brett about Cassidy's behaviour. Amy's mom arrives from South Africa.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: I Have To Tell You Something
programme.desc: Jason and Cassia struggle with Jason's work schedule and the wedding budget. Also, Danielle breaks bad news to Mohamed and Evelin bonds with Justin's Mom. Plus, Brett's skeptical friend Sue finally meets Daya.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Going Once, Going Twice...Gone?
programme.desc: Danny and Amy's families meet; Cassia breaks down during a fight with Jason; Justin surprises Evelin and his mother.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Red Flags
programme.desc: Mohamed hopes he is making the right choice. Danny's brothers pass him the sex torch. Cassia confronts Jason's skeptical brother when meeting his family for the first time. Brett's mom causes Brett and Daya to question if they should get married.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: I'm Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: Chelsea panics before the wedding. Jason and Cassia aim to resolve their relationship problems in Las Vegas. Mohamed goes AWOL on Danielle. Brett has to choose between Daya and his mom. Evelin continues to bond with Justin's family.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LIV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo test their criminal skills in 'The Con-Bine,' get a little handsy with 'Freaks in the Streets,' and discover the weird underground culture of 'Sub-Humans.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matt Schlager

programme.title: Movie: Truth or Dare

programme.title: Movie: Candyman

programme.title: Movie: Empire State
programme.desc: Two friends plan to rob an armoured car but a NYPD officer stands in their way.

programme.title: Movie: Pitch Black

programme.title: Property Brothers: Glitz and Glamour

programme.title: Design At Your Door: Sweet Retreats
programme.desc: Tamara Day helps a San Diego nurse and her young family with her distinct style. Then, Orlando Soria helps a Dallas couple get playful by transforming their chaotic playroom into a cool space for creativity.

programme.title: Design At Your Door: Family Matters

programme.title: Renovation Island: Paradise Found
programme.desc: Bryan and Sarah Baeumler, plus their four kids, travel to the Bahamas to begin the renovation of a fifty-year-old beachfront hotel. During demolition, the crew finds major termite damage.

programme.title: Renovation Island: The Deep End
programme.desc: Demolition begins in the honeymoon suite and pool. The crew uncovers decrepit plumbing in the hotel block, putting stress on the build's schedule and budget. The Baeumlers reveal the completion of the resort's pool.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Buying a Piece of History
