programme.title: Pawn Stars: Hot Air Buffoon
programme.desc: The shop heats up after Corey spends tons of cash buying a 12-person hot air balloon and breaks one of Rick's golden rules in the process.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: License to Pawn
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars look to buy an 1862 Civil War postage stamp that is encased in a coin shaped holder.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bugs Money
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars get revved up when they check out a classic 1941 Indian motorcycle. A woman comes by with a golf club once owned by the King of Cool himself, Dean Martin. A Bugs Bunny poster signed by Mel Blanc is brought in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Crosby, Stills and Cash
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are blown away when a pair of WWII bomb fins drop into the shop. A guy brings in a Martin guitar signed by '60s super group Crosby, Stills and Nash.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Free Agent
programme.desc: Lock and load with the Pawn Stars when a D. Moore pistol from the Civil War shoots into the shop. They also put a team together to compete in a quiz competition.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Colt to the Touch
programme.desc: Rick and Corey check out a '51 Chevy driven by Steve McQueen in his last movie. Then, a man has a Colt .45 he claims was used to kill Jesse James.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Off the Hook
programme.desc: The guys check out a collection of sketches from the 1954 Sam Sheppard trial. The man who inspired 'The Fugitive,' is Rick willing to deliver a verdict on these rare drawings?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Head Games
programme.desc: Pendants from the first two Super Bowls come into the shop. Rick and Corey check out a pair of Igorot spears. And later, the Old Man gets flooded with birthday gifts.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Tag Team
programme.desc: A Bible that belonged to Mickey Mantle throws Corey a curveball. Then, a customer brings Rick a pen President Johnson used to sign Medicare into law. Later, the guys start a competition that tests their buying skills.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Death and Taxidermy
programme.desc: Get spooked out with the Pawn Stars when a 1547 edition of 'The Dance of Death' haunts the shop. Next, things get whimsical when two sculptures from Dr. Seuss' unorthodox taxidermy collection are brought in. A tear-gas baton forces its way into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Cowboys and Cannons
programme.desc: A 19th century sun dial cannon, a signed helmet from one of Hollywood's biggest flops, Heaven's Gate, sterling silver baby figurines, a 1964 Beatles board game.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Samurais and Centerfolds
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars learn the way of the samurai when Rick and Chumlee come to grips with a valuable Japanese katana from the 1800s.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Oh Holy Pawn
programme.desc: Rick gets the opportunity to purchase a page from the Gutenberg Bible, the first printed book. Corey finds a rare six-sheet movie poster from the classic 'Ziegfeld Follies.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawned at the Stake
programme.desc: Something wicked to the shop comes when an 18th century 'Tryal of Witches' book finds its way there. Rick checks out a 20th century airplane control yoke and a gold-plated banjo. The guys evaluate a restored car from the film 'Wanye's World.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Masonic Pawn
programme.desc: Rick gets his hands on a hat worn by Prince and considers the sale. An Egyptian scarab ring scuttles into the shop for evaluation. A WWII era head-shaped glass planter also visits the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Killer Pawn
programme.desc: A signed shower curtain by Anthony Perkins; an 1882 Gold Certificate and 1918 Federal Reserve note; an 1800s Millionaire Calculator; a 1950s Russian night vision scope.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Houston, We Have A Deal
programme.desc: A lunar Bible from Apollo 14; a 1930s Buck Rogers Disintegrator Gun; miniature samples of a 1950s kitchen; a 1950s Beetle Bailey original print.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Highly Explosive Pawn
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck when a British Navy gunpowder bucket blasts into the shop and a seller approaches the Pawn Stars to present them with a past prop from 'Back to the Future, Part II.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Boats and Bros

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Monster of the Deep
programme.desc: Strange footage captures a mystifying monster from the deep, baffling marine biologists. Bizarre ghost lights haunt North Carolina mountains for centuries. When a giant explosion is caught on tape in New Mexico, investigators fear the US is under attack.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Midnight Train to Hell
programme.desc: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls. When something terrifying emerges from a mysterious lake in Ireland, experts wonder if it could be a modern-day leviathan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Beast That Ate Jaws
programme.desc: When a shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is caught on tape near Russia's Area 51, and the evidence might point to a cover-up.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Mystery of Doomsday Jungle
programme.desc: When 400 earthquakes strike a remote jungle in Mexico over just two weeks, dozens of UFO sightings are reported nearby, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this bizarre event is the smoking gun evidence of alien contact.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: War on the Amazon
programme.desc: A remote island on the Amazon is the site of an alleged alien attack, and a team of experts use the latest tech and first-hand testimony to investigate what really happened during this sinister incident.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: US Navy vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Evidence from a top-secret file reveals the unsolved mystery of an American aircraft carrier's strange encounter with a UFO, and a team of experts use the latest tech and a vital eyewitness to investigate the true story.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Alien Crater of Doom
programme.desc: New discoveries of strange evidence in the forests of Argentina suggest an alien craft landed here, and to prove it, a team of experts use cutting edge technology to investigate the area and hunt down the truth.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Are We Alone?
programme.desc: A team of experts use the latest science and cutting-edge technology to investigate if extraterrestrial life has contacted humankind, and what they discover could reveal if there's an international conspiracy to cover it all up.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Horror I Don't Remember
programme.desc: Sherry Shafer never had a good relationship with her younger brother, Brian Britton, but she never expected to lose everything because of him. Today, all she has left is the fear that one day he will return to finish what he started 26 years ago.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our House of Horrors

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Almost Got Away With It

programme.title: American Monster: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: US Air Force sergeant Nathan Paet and his family appear to live a blissfully normal life - as these never-before-aired home videos attest. But blind greed would bring about the destruction of this loving family.

programme.title: American Monster: Flesh and Blood
programme.desc: Young parents Adriene and James Magee work hard to provide a stable life for their three small children in rural Louisiana. But underneath the idyllic scenes lurks a dark secret, culminating in a heinous double-murder at the hands of a loved-one.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Evidence Never Lies
programme.desc: A young woman is found drowned in her bathtub and the evidence at the crime scene indicates her killer was someone she knew and trusted.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: One of Us
programme.desc: A young records clerk at the Seattle police department is murdered on her way to work her overnight shift. Police ty to find the evidence to catch the killer of one of their own.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Notes from a Killer
programme.desc: When a young girl disappears off a quiet suburban street, it marks the beginning of a terrifying game of cat and mouse between police and her abductor.

programme.title: American Monster: Falling Down
programme.desc: Alene and George Jenkins are the perfect couple living a perfect life. When their desire for children leads them to adopt a son and a daughter it seems their family is complete. But instead it triggers a dark spiral ending in an unspeakably awful crime.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Trail of Betrayal

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Haunting Memories

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: While Her Children Slept

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Murder in Store
programme.desc: A young woman is murdered inside the video game store she managed by a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Searching for Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Nikki McPhatter has a busy work and social life, but there's only one thing missing true love. When she doesn't show up for her usual work shift, her friends and family immediately worry -- and point to her online relationships.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Cyber Psycho
programme.desc: For lonely realtor Mary Kay Beckman the dream of finding love through internet dating sites becomes a living nightmare when a relationship with a seemingly charming online admirer turns in to a race against time to track down a psychopath.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: Firefighter Sam Dreher and his wife Danielle are the perfect couple. But after their hopes of happiness are dashed, their marriage fails. When Sam falls in love with another woman, his affair triggers a chain of events that spirals out of control.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Girl in the Photo

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Lies and Death
programme.desc: The facade of perfection thrives until a mystery gunman blows away an all-American girl and her wealthy doctor husband.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death for Dessert
programme.desc: Sparks fly when picture-perfect divorcés Tami and Alan meet at a wedding - within months they're married too. But when Tami starts uses her sultry good looks to get what she wants from every man she meets, one of them will end up dead.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death of a Salesman
programme.desc: John Parker marries Judy, a nice girl from the wrong side of the tracks. John uses his wealth and status to keep his new wife happy. But Judy's rumored romantic entanglements with a string of John's employees prove to be too much for John to bear.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Ambition to Die For
programme.desc: Dino's long work hours and missing bail jumper make his wife suspicious. Then a hidden secret is revealed.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Smith: The Two-Fisted Marshal of Abeline
programme.desc: Using his fists instead of a pistol, professional boxer turned frontier lawman Tom Smith is determined to clean up 'Hell on Earth.' This is the little known story of one of the greatest lawmen of the Wild West.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Jelly Bryce: The Perfect Shot
programme.desc: With outlaws firing machine guns in the streets of Oklahoma City, sharp-shooting legend Delf 'Jelly' Bryce is on a collision course with some of the most violent men in America.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Gourmet Holiday
programme.desc: A showcase of gourmet food for holiday entertaining or for gift giving.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Florida Engagement Renovation
programme.desc: Newly engaged couple Missy and Devon are looking to purchase their first home together in Ormond-by-the-Sea, Florida. With their wedding months away, the project threatens to be too much for the young couple to handle.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Galveston Getaway
programme.desc: This couple is ready to find a beach home of their own after years of visiting relatives on the sunny shores of Galveston, TX. They find a house with potential but it's in need of serious work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Three's Company on the Gulf Coast
programme.desc: A family searches for a beach retreat in Gulf Shores, AL. While they have different opinions on what type of house they should get, they all agree they want to live near the beach.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hillbilly Lemonade
programme.desc: The guys must get creative to make something worthwhile from a lackluster cabin. Later, Mark visits an incredible finished cabin made from logs he salvaged on the first season of the show.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Helping Hands
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders help out folks in need including Boy Scouts in Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hitting the Barnwood Jackpot
programme.desc: Mark's client wants to use the barnwood from an enormous Pennsylvania bank barn to outfit his Arizona restaurant. It's a beast of a job in the middle of a heat wave, but the Barnwood Builders just won't quit.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Montana Barn Battle
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders square off against their toughest barn yet- a stubborn old timber frame with wooden pegs, metal spikes, steel bolts and a whole lot of beams. But saving this barn is worth the effort because it will be rebuilt for a veterans group.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Masterpiece
programme.desc: A mountain home in Conifer, Colorado, gets a $375K deck with a wall-sized stone fireplace, a hot tub that seats 12 and a grill kitchen. Jason's team is pitted against Mother Nature, however, when an icy road leads to a delivery truck crash.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Scenic Overlook With a Private Deck
programme.desc: The team plans to create a large enclosed space that homeowners can enjoy throughout the year. As a retaining wall is uncovered, the plans for expansion come into question. They also battle cold, icy terrain and a 25-foot cliff.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Entertainment Mecca With Glass Walls
programme.desc: The team transforms a useless, small, and shabby two-level deck into a double decker party zone with all the familiarities of home. Included are 18-foot high ceilings, 11-foot tall glass panels, and more audio and visual elements they've ever added.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Blockbuster BBQ Deck Overlooking a Golf Course
programme.desc: Ed and Becky live next to a golf course. Their old deck is weathered and crumbling, and can only be used a few months a year. They challenge the Mega Crew to build a $200,000 deck that will serve as the ultimate spot to barbecue and relax.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dream Deck With a Cozy Feel
programme.desc: Garth and the team face a huge challenge transforming a rickety, unsafe deck into a two-story masterpiece with a stone kitchen and bar, fire and water features and a spiral staircase.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Fireside Retreat With a Rustic Feel
programme.desc: The team tears down a dilapidated and useless deck to make room for a $200,000 rustic retreat. Even with design changes and delayed materials, they're able to create a space with a fireplace, skylights, a fire pit, and rustic accents.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dramatic Cliffside Triple Deck
programme.desc: Transforming this home's 20 year old deck into a mega deck requires a complete demo and rebuild. Plans include redoing a kids' play deck and a master bedroom deck. The challenge is that the property sits on the side of a cliff with a 40 foot drop.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Southern Plantation-Style Deck
programme.desc: A couple wants to add a deck to their home in Louisiana. The current deck is rotting and offers no protection from the heat or insect, so Garth's plantation-style design includes enclosed rooms and air conditioning.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Colorado Contemporary Deck
programme.desc: The crew has a $350,000 budget for a contemporary-style mega deck with a curved hand-cut stone fireplace, a pergola and a pizza oven. Building outdoors in winter subjects the crew to dangerous icy conditions and an oversight threatens the pergola build.

programme.title: Mega Decks: In Garth We Trust
programme.desc: A half-finished deck means a call for Garth to deliver the deck of one couples dreams. But to make their dream work, he needs to cut down a few trees, which the owners are unsure of.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Home Gets a Two-Story Cliffside Deck
programme.desc: Mark loves his cliffside log home in the Rocky Mountains, but the small existing deck doesn't take advantage of the million-dollar view.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Mountain Retreat with a Rocky View
programme.desc: The team contends with nearly impassable roads, mountain weather and a build site on top a granite boulder.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Texas-Sized Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew saddle up and ride on down to Leakey, TX, to build a colossal, Texas-sized treehouse. He rounds-up 'the magnificent seven' of cypresses alongside the banks of the Frio River and builds a treehouse with the longest bridge in NT&S history.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Nelson Family Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete gifts his daughter Emily, and Patrick, her boyfriend and an NTS carpenter, with the ultimate housewarming gift - a treehouse of their very own - by turning a piece of Nelson family history into a Moroccan marvel nested nearly 35 feet off the ground.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Sunrise Day Camp Clubhouse
programme.desc: Pete constructs an amazing clubhouse for Sunrise Day Camp: a summer camp for kids battling cancer. This open-air treehouse grants campers full interaction with nature by erasing the line between indoors and out.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Merry Fishmas!
programme.desc: Pete heads to Dogwood Canyon, a 10,000 acre nature preserve in Missouri. Despite a tight Christmas deadline, Pete and his team create a two-story hands-on learning haven with a giant copper-topped turret that can endure thousands of visitors.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Rock 'n' Roll to Red River
programme.desc: Noah Cappe discovers that cheddar chimneys make him twist and shout at Burlington’s Sound of Music Festival and feels right at home at the Red River Valley Fair with the redneck taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hogs and Dogs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe sets sail for The Great Frederick Fair in Maryland, where he goes all in for The Whole Hog, finds his sea legs with The Crabby Dog, rounds out his plate with Cake-a-Dilla and dances for joy with the Hula Boat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Tons of Taters
programme.desc: Ingenious fair vendors use the humble potato to create some amazing and original midway food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Family Dinner
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe takes a seat at the table for family dinner, carnival style.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Local Legends
programme.desc: From sandwiches to desserts, Noah discovers foods that put cities on the map and some that present an entire state.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bacon 2: The Sequel
programme.desc: Bacon is the star of its own blockbuster sequel and host Noah Cappe is at the front of line to savor even more bacon-tastic fairground favs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fries in Disguise
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Volusia County Fair in Florida, where two carnival classics get a makeover for the cheesy tater corndog and the black forest funnel cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dude, Where's My Carb?
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes on the Porter County Fair in Indiana, where a pile of locally sourced pork is served three ways in a single dish.

programme.title: Food Paradise: At the Drive-In
programme.desc: From crispy, juicy fried chicken and hearty chili cheese fries to zesty taco burgers and deep-fried hot dogs, diners are pulling up for a taste of Americana.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Off-the-chain Eats
programme.desc: From a 14-pound mountain of nachos and a barbecue a sandwich as mighty as the Mississippi to a two-pork punch of a breakfast burrito, these citywide franchises have gone off the chain.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Working Actors Eat, Too
programme.desc: Tia shares her tricks to balancing her hectic schedule as a full-time mom and working actress. She takes us behind the scenes while bringing homemade treats to her hair and make-up team on the set of her new show.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Girls' Night
programme.desc: It's all about the throwback when Tia cooks some of her favorite recipes for her favorite girlfriends.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: A Slam Dunk of a Day
programme.desc: Today is all about slam dunks with Tia's son, Cree, his friends and their moms. NBA All-Star player, Metta World Peace, surprises them with some basketball lessons and Tia herself jerseys-up for some one-on-one action.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Tia & Cory Cook-Off
programme.desc: Tia & Cory to set up a cook-off to settle once and for all who is the master of the kitchen.

programme.title: Simply Laura: All Day Breakfast
programme.desc: Laura's inspired to create an all-day breakfast menu. She prepares creme fraiche and veggie frittata, smoked salmon and dill quiche and a breakfast bruschetta bar.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Girls' Day and Night!
programme.desc: Laura spends a full day with her girls before heading out for some shopping and pampering she tackles some finger foods that she can assemble before the fun.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: South of the Border
programme.desc: We head South of the Border for Bobby's Mexican themed brunch with his version of Huevos Rancheros with Chorizo and a spicy Tomato-Red Chile Sauce.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Slumber Party
programme.desc: When Bobby's daughter Sophie has a sleepover it can only mean one thing... dad's in the kitchen cooking up brunch for everyone! This fun and tasty menu starts with an apple pie oatmeal with bruleed crust that's sure to wake up your taste buds.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Weekend Staycation
programme.desc: A weekend staycation brunch at Chef Bobby Flay's home! Bobby's kitchen is the destination for a cozy menu of crunchy maple topped oatmeal, avocado salmon benedict, cinnamon sugar mini pancake muffins.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocoholic Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is covering the kitchen in chocolate for a luscious menu of sweet and savory treats like dark chocolate waffles with white chocolate custard sauce and espresso-chocolate whipped cream.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Phenomenal Philly Food Feast
programme.desc: Nick Lachey hooks up with Michael Symon in Philadelphia, one of the best beer cities in the country with a food scene to match. From Chef Jose Garces' over-the-top bourbon burger, to true German smoked sausages.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beef, Belly, Bacon and Bourbon
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon starts with sweet and savory pork belly sliders with bacon jam and bourbon sauce, nestled inside a fluffy doughnut bun.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Dangerously Good Eats
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a burger in Memphis, Tenn., that's so dangerously good, innocent bystanders had better beware! Then pizza gets a brunch makeover in Atlanta with creamy scrambled eggs and crispy pancetta.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Feast and Fries
programme.desc: At the Paris Fair in Ontario, Canada, Noah Cappe ponders a meat pie poutine. At the Washington County Fair in New York he taps into sugar shack cotton candy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Funnel Cakes and Fried Fudge
programme.desc: The York Fair in Pennsylvania has been drawing crowds since 1765, and has had 250 years to perfect its carnival eats! Noah decks the halls with a taste of Christmas, goes off on the burger bomb pretzel, and enjoys a fork free chick 'n' waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Everything's Bigger and Better in Texas
programme.desc: Discover a Forth Worth Tex Mex Burrito almost as big as the state of Texas itself.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: California Dreamin'
programme.desc: Noah is California dreamin' for the Golden State's best carnival eats. He sets things on fire with a Deep Pit BBQ dinner, gets groovy with the Green Goddess and celebrates with Birthday Cake Crepes.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burger Bonanza
programme.desc: In this episode, Noah Cappe explores the huge variety of options carnival cooks have come up with to honor America's much loved sandwich. From classic beef burgers to exotic meats, buns made from pretzels and even donuts, these burgers will inspire you.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pizza Party
programme.desc: On the fairground, Noah Cappe discovers some amazing pizzas in Georgia and Florida State.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fan Friction

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here

programme.title: DuckTales: Woo-oo!
programme.desc: Donald Duck takes Huey, Dewey and Louie to reclusive Scrooge McDuck's mansion where they uncover family secrets and stir up more adventure than they bargained for.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War!
programme.desc: Magica De Spell is close to exacting revenge on Scrooge, so the family races against time to plan a dangerous rescue mission to save Scrooge and the city.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Battle in the Skies!

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Mike's New Boots

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Carl Gets a Girl
programme.desc: Mike spends time at Molly's house, bonding with her mother and sister, when Carl borrows his apartment for a date.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Large Birds, Spiders and Mom
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan ignorantly try to prepare Jake for his first day of junior high, but may wind up traumatizing him instead.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Media Room Slash Dungeon

programme.title: Mom: Soapy Eyes and a Clean Slate

programme.title: Mom: Free Therapy and a Dead Lady's Yard Sale

programme.title: Friends: The One After Vegas
programme.desc: After a night of partying, a hung-over Ross and Rachel don't know if they are married.

programme.desc: Monica and Chandler cancel their plans to live together, due to their bickering over their tastes.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: It Just Goes to Snow Ya

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: It's Been Ice Snowing You!
